stemHtml: The flight warning system (FWS) generates a caution message if:

options.a: immediate crew awareness is required and subsequent crew action will be required.
options.b: crew awareness is required and subsequent crew action may be required.
options.c: immediate recognition and corrective or compensatory action by the crew is required.
options.d: crew awareness is required and corrective or compensatory action by the crew is immediately required.
